インタフェース CliPlugin

public interface CliPlugin
Service provider interface for plugin-based CLI command registration.

Plugins implement this interface and register themselves using Java's ServiceLoader mechanism. This enables automatic command discovery and registration at runtime.

Usage in Plugin

public class MyPlugin implements CliPlugin {
    @Override
    public String getPluginName() {
        return "my-plugin";
    }

    @Override
    public void registerCommands(CommandRepository repo) {
        Options opts = new Options();
        opts.addOption("n", "name", true, "Name to greet");
        repo.addCommand(new CommandDefinition(
            "greet", opts, "Greet someone", "Greetings",
            cl -> System.out.println("Hello, " + cl.getOptionValue("n")),
            getPluginName()));
    }
}

META-INF/services registration

Create file META-INF/services/com.scivicslab.pluggablecli.CliPlugin containing the fully-qualified class name of the implementation.
関連項目:
  • PluginLoader
  • ServiceLoader

  • メソッドの概要

    修飾子とタイプ
    メソッド
    説明
    default String
    getDescription()
    Returns a human-readable description of this plugin.
    String
    getPluginName()
    Returns the unique name of this plugin.
    default String
    getPluginVersion()
    Returns the version of this plugin.
    void
    registerCommands(CommandRepository repository)
    Registers commands provided by this plugin into the given repository.

  • メソッドの詳細

    • registerCommands

      void registerCommands(CommandRepository repository)
      Registers commands provided by this plugin into the given repository.
      パラメータ:
      repository - the command repository to register commands into

    • getPluginName

      String getPluginName()
      Returns the unique name of this plugin. This value should match the pluginName field in CommandDefinition for commands registered by this plugin.
      戻り値:
      the plugin name

    • getPluginVersion

      default String getPluginVersion()
      Returns the version of this plugin.
      戻り値:
      the plugin version, or "unknown" if not overridden

    • getDescription

      default String getDescription()
      Returns a human-readable description of this plugin.
      戻り値:
      the plugin description
